title: TotalArea Result
description: Returns the sum of areas of all results.
notes: TotalArea can be used to determine all pixels in the image being searched whose blobs fall within the MinArea and MaxArea properties.  By setting NumberToFind to 0 and MinArea to 1, the Blob object can be used as a pixel counter.
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: Blob, DefectFinder, LineInspector, ArcInspector
